rationale.risk-routing: Autonomy-impact tiers determine which applications require stronger human oversight.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Defined autonomy levels specify approval, monitoring, intervention, and fallback controls.
rationale.org-governance: Organization-wide classification standardizes risk assessment and deployment controls.
rationale.framework: Reusable risk matrix guides LLM integration across engineering lifecycles.
rationale.design-only: Mechanism is specified and illustrated, but neither implemented nor validated.
rationale.general-ai: Framework governs domain-agnostic LLM applications, not AI-generated code specifically.
rationale.assistive: Assisted and guided levels cover human-initiated, suggestion-level generation.
rationale.agentic: Supervised and automated levels cover autonomous artifact and decision generation.
rationale.metrics: Defines quality and compliance risk levels from autonomy and impact.
